025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary for

From: Ailsa Terry
Sent: Wednesday, April 9, 2025 4:53:18 PM
To: Peter Mandelson ; David Tinline
Subject: RE: US/Japan: tariffs
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Perfect many thanks. @David Tinline will be the PS tomorrow so copying him so he

flag to the PM in pre brief.

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson.
Sent: 09 April 2025 20:56
To: Ailsa Terry
Subject: Fw: US/Japan: tariffs
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

To give you a further taste of how the Japanese are feeling ahead of the PM's call.

Peter
